◎简　　介  

　　This is the debut feature fillm by german director Roland Klick who made classics like SUPERMARKET and DEADLOCK.In this debut Roland Klick is searching for the heart and ache of german society in portraying a middle class family in the 60's living in a suburbal area who are confronted with a crime which they don't understand.
